query:
-- Add new columns to consent_forms table for detailed consent tracking
ALTER TABLE consent_forms
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS projectId INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS childFullName VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS childDateOfBirth DATE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS parentGuardianFullName VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS parentGuardianContactNumber VARCHAR(50),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS parentGuardianEmail VARCHAR(320),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS photographsPermission BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS videoPermission BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS bothPermission BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS noPermission BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS internalUseEvaluation BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS internalUseSafeguarding BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS internalUseTraining BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS externalUseSocialMedia BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS externalUseWebsite BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS externalUsePrintedMaterials BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS externalUseFundingReports BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS externalUseLocalMedia BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS externalUseEducationalPresentations BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS usePermissionType ENUM('internal_only', 'internal_and_external', 'internal_and_specific'),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS specificExternalUses TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS identificationType ENUM('full_identification', 'first_name_only', 'anonymous', 'no_identification'),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS thirdPartySharing BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS dataProtectionConfirmed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS safeguardingConfirmed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS additionalInformation TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS parentGuardianSignature TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS parentGuardianPrintedName VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS consentDate DATE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS secondParentGuardianSignature TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS secondParentGuardianPrintedName VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS secondParentConsentDate DATE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS receivedBy VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS dateReceived DATE,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS storedIn VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS submittedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ipAddress VARCHAR(45),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS userAgent TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27sEaT2BZNqjVK1.3777d857e0cd --database JfuWbL5SX5FRFCFWK9F3WU --execute

ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS projectId INT,

ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS thirdPartySharing BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
